meaning: 卡尔菲利干酪(一种威尔士全脂白干酪)
examples: Caerphilly Council was one of the first authorities to prohibit drinking in specified public places.
Monmouthshire was the third best performing council at 58.1%, with Caerphilly second at 59.9%.
Once again Caerphilly refused to let their heads drop and went in search of a score.
